creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Updating and/or new installation from ports on 12-CURRENT (FreeBSD 12.0-CURRENT #130 r323133: Sat Sep  2 21:42:22 CEST 2017 amd64) ends up on all systems I try to perform update/installation in the error shown below:

[...]
[  7%] Linking CXX static library liblibdxfrw.a
cd /usr/ports/graphics/qgis/work/QGIS-final-2_18_12/src/app/dwg/libdxfrw && /usr/local/bin/cmake -P CMakeFiles/libdxfrw.dir/cmake_clean_target.cmake
cd /usr/ports/graphics/qgis/work/QGIS-final-2_18_12/src/app/dwg/libdxfrw && /usr/local/bin/cmake -E cmake_link_script CMakeFiles/libdxfrw.dir/link.txt --verbose=1
/usr/bin/ar qc liblibdxfrw.a  CMakeFiles/libdxfrw.dir/drw_classes.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libdxfrw.dir/drw_entities.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libdxfrw.dir/drw_header.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libdxfrw.dir/drw_objects.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libdxfrw.dir/libdwgr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libdxfrw.dir/libdxfrw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libdxfrw.dir/intern/drw_dbg.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libdxfrw.dir/intern/drw_textcodec.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libdxfrw.dir/intern/dwgbuffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libdxfrw.dir/intern/dwgreader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libdxfrw.dir/intern/dwgreader15.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libdxfrw.dir/intern/dwgreader18.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libdxfrw.dir/intern/dwgreader21.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libdxfrw.dir/intern/dwgreader24.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libdxfrw.dir/intern/dwgreader27.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libdxfrw.dir/intern/dwgutil.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libdxfrw.dir/intern/dxfreader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libdxfrw.dir/intern/dxfwriter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libdxfrw.dir/intern/rscodec.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib liblibdxfrw.a
gmake[4]: Leaving directory '/usr/ports/graphics/qgis/work/QGIS-final-2_18_12'
[  7%] Built target libdxfrw
gmake[3]: Leaving directory '/usr/ports/graphics/qgis/work/QGIS-final-2_18_12'
gmake[2]: *** [Makefile:155: all] Error 2
gmake[2]: Leaving directory '/usr/ports/graphics/qgis/work/QGIS-final-2_18_12'
===> Compilation failed unexpectedly.
Try to set MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes and rebuild before reporting the failure to
the maintainer.
*** Error code 1
